headings: (c) All of that property located at 789 Some Street, Bryan, TX 77801
text: 3. Commercial General Liability Insurance, including, but not limited to, premises and operations, Products and Completed Operations, Personal Injury and Contractual Liability, and coverage for commercial construction. Coverage shall be written on ISO Occurrence form CG 00 01 1093 or a substitute form providing equivalent coverage. Coverage to be provided on an occurrence basis.
